title: Video by quantjason

segments.text: I decided to make more of those stacks that outperform the other strategies and
seems to me that it is working because this is our best day in props ever and we actually hit
a daily profit goal of $1,200 which is what our daily goal is for all accounts. We hit it on nine
accounts. Last time we were here in New York City which was about a month and a half ago,
we had nothing set up. I mean we had a good idea. Three accounts running just gold and then three
accounts running just thank you and these are the ones that are running just no no just oil please
yeah no just I took that off

full_text: I decided to make more of those stacks that outperform the other strategies and seems to me that it is working because this is our best day in props ever and we actually hit a daily profit goal of $1,200 which is what our daily goal is for all accounts. We hit it on nine accounts. Last time we were here in New York City which was about a month and a half ago, we had nothing set up. I mean we had a good idea. Three accounts running just gold and then three accounts running just thank you and these are the ones that are running just no no just oil please yeah no just I took that off
